properties.displayName: Suspicious Command Shell Activity Encoded or Obfuscated Commands
properties.description: Detects suspicious use of cmd.exe executing encoded or obfuscated commands often used by attackers to evade detection.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\cmd.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "/c" or CommandLine|contains has "&&" or CommandLine|contains has "||" or CommandLine|contains has "^" or CommandLine|contains has "%" or CommandLine|contains has "set " or CommandLine|contains has "for " or CommandLine|contains has "call " or CommandLine|contains has "powershell" or CommandLine|contains has "certutil" or CommandLine|contains has "bitsadmin" or CommandLine|contains has "whoami")
